title: Voice memo — Sep 7 2024 (music only)
html:
40-second 2 AM voice memo from Sep 7 2024 — Whisper transcribed only "[MUSIC PLAYING]." Likely captured during the shanghai study abroad arrival window; node preserved without content. Candidate for re-transcription on a larger Whisper model.

shanghai study abroad · china chapter · recording as note · shanghai
